channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Cruise ship hit by hantavirus outbreak arrives in Tenerife
item.description: Hantavirus is usually spread by rodents but can in rare cases be transmitted person to person.

item.title: Strickland vs Chimaev – UFC 328: Strickland downs Chimaev on split decision
item.description: Sean Strickland won 48–47, 48–47 and 47–48 against Khamzat Chimaev in a fight that failed to live up to its hype.

item.title: Dubois stops Wardley in 11th round to take WBO heavyweight boxing title
item.description: Daniel Dubois recovered from two knockdowns to win a second World Heavyweight title with a stoppage of Fabio Wardley.

item.title: Macron tours East Africa amid push to redefine France’s role in Africa
item.description: Paris seeks to repair economic and security ties while countering rising anti-French sentiment across Africa.

item.title: Two wins, two losses: What India, Pakistan have learned a year after war
item.description: India and Pakistan each claim strategic successes after the four-day conflict, as tensions continue to simmer.

item.title: Person dies after being hit by plane at Denver airport
item.description: A Frontier Airlines plane has hit and killed a person at Denver’s international airport.

item.title: Putin suggests Russia’s war on Ukraine ‘coming to an end’
item.description: Russian president also says he is willing to meet Zelenskyy in a third country if a long-term peace deal is reached.

item.title: ‘No Kings’ protest outside Buckingham Palace
item.description: British anti-royals have staged a ‘No Kings’ protest outside Buckingham Palace in London.

item.title: Satellite images show likely oil slick off Iran’s Kharg Island
item.description: Satellite images have captured a suspected oil slick spanning dozens of square kilometres near Iran’s Kharg Island.

item.title: Iran war live: IRGC warns US against attacks on ships; Israel bombs Lebanon
item.description: US-Iran ceasefire holds as Tehran warns Washington against attacks on tankers and Israel kills 24 people in Lebanon.

item.title: WHO chief says Hantavirus outbreak ‘is not COVID’
item.description: WHO chief says Hantavirus outbreak ‘is not COVID’

item.title: Brazil judge bars law that could reduce Bolsonaro’s 27-year prison sentence
item.description: Supreme Court Justice Alexandre de Moraes suspends use of law to reduce prison sentences, pending further review.

item.title: One killed in Gaza as Turkish FM talks peace efforts with Hamas official
item.description: Israel continues to violate a 'ceasefire' agreed to in October with hundreds more killed across the Strip.

item.title: For the first time, Putin says he’s open to meeting Zelensky outside Russia
item.description: Vladimir Putin changes tone, says for first time he will meet Zelenskyy in a third nation.

item.title: Palestinian family says settlers forced them to exhume father’s body
item.description: A Palestinian family in Jenin says Israeli settlers forced them to exhume their father hours after his funeral.

item.title: Car bomb attack and ambush in northwest Pakistan kills at least 12 police
item.description: Bomber and several fighters detonate explosives-laden vehicle near security post in Bannu, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa.

item.title: Should we be worried about the hantavirus outbreak?
item.description: The incident has drawn comparisons to the COVID-19 pandemic.

item.title: Venezuela’s Delcy Rodriguez heads to The Hague for land dispute case
item.description: Trip to be first time Rodriguez has left Caribbean since Maduro abduction, will attend ICJ case on Guyana land dispute.

item.title: Israeli settlers force Palestinian family to exhume and rebury their father
item.description: UN condemns confrontation in occupied West Bank as 'appalling and emblematic of the dehumanisation of Palestinians'.

item.title: Missing Singaporeans Located Near Mt. Dukono Crater Rim
item.description: Indonesian authorities locate missing Singaporeans after Mount Dukono eruption.

item.title: Man City beat Brentford to close gap to Arsenal to two points in title race
item.description: Manchester City score three in the second half of their Premier League match against Brentford to maintain title hopes.

item.title: Tucker Carlson’s pivot
item.description: From MAGA loyalist to antiwar dissident - is Tucker Carlson’s pivot sincere or a savvy reinvention?

item.title: Syria and Lebanon make ‘significant progress’ at talks on joint interests
item.description: In Damascus, Lebanese prime minister and Syrian president discuss issues including security, transport and energy.

item.title: Parent company of Trump’s Truth Social site reports $400m loss this year
item.description: Losses driven largely by depreciation of cryptocurrency assets as prices of digital currencies tumble.

item.title: “Nowhere left to go”: Gaza residents return to rubble after Israeli strike
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Tareq Abu Azzoum reports from Al-Shati Refugee Camp after overnight Israeli airstrikes.
